title: Robofrog 2: Rise of the Ribbitarians
description: Every tadpole sees its darkest day, but eventually… we rise. He’s part robot, part frog, and he’s back.
altHero: Robofrog emerging from a pond, lifting up a lily pad with his head
alt2: edge of a pond with lily pads
alt3: top of Robofrog’s head pushing the lily pad up
